roles.name: Avatar Sage
roles.description: Bridges all four disciplines — designs the over-arching solution that keeps balance across the nations.

roles.name: White Lotus Grandmaster
roles.description: Orchestrates the order's plays — holds timeline, scope, and the wisdom of the elders.

roles.name: Scroll Keeper of the Western Air Temple
roles.description: Steward of the airbending scrolls — owns records, layouts, fields, and permission sets.

roles.name: Mechanist of the Northern Air Temple
roles.description: Tinkerer of war balloons and gliders — builds Apex, LWC, and platform features.

roles.name: Fire Sage of the Crescent Island
roles.description: Master of the temple's craft — sets standards across the senior benders.

roles.name: Dai Li Senior Agent
roles.description: Patrols the upper ring of customer requirements with practiced earthbending precision.

roles.name: Dai Li Acolyte
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration through the lower ring under the Senior Agent's watch.

roles.name: Bridge Builder of Wan Shi Tong
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between the spirit library and the mortal realms.

roles.name: Wan Shi Tong's Knowledge Seeker
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge Builder's plan.

roles.name: Knowledge Seeker Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Spirit Oasis
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds the maladies before they reach the Avatar.

roles.name: Town Crier of Omashu
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the trumpet for the message — leads all marketing craft across the nations.

roles.name: Herald of the Earth King
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call across the walls of Ba Sing Se.

roles.name: Pamphleteer of the Lower Ring
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the streets — content, creative, and the daily message.

roles.name: Council Scribe of the Air Temples
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the monks' design.

roles.name: Master Mechanist of Caldera
roles.description: Senior craftsman of war machines — leads the most senior platform builds at the capital forges.

roles.name: Earth Rumble Apprentice
roles.description: Newcomer to the ring — learns configuration and discovery under the senior earthbenders.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Air Nomads & Southern Water Tribe — Avatar Awakening Platform
realms.subAccountName: Air Nomads & Southern Water Tribe Alliance

realms.projectName: Earth Kingdom — Ba Sing Se Stewardship CRM

Fire Sage of the Crescent Island

earth-kingdom.themedRole: Fire Sage of the Crescent Island

air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.name: Iceberg Cracks Open
air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.description: Discovery sign-off — the Avatar awakens from the southern ice.

air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.name: Glider Flight Test
air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.description: Build kickoff: first glider takes wing from the southern temple.

air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.name: Council at Kyoshi Island
air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.description: Mid-project gate: warrior elders review the plan.

air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.name: Sky Bison Migration
air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.description: Phase invoice trigger: Appa carries the team across the world.

air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.name: Avatar State Mastered
air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.description: Go-Live: the Avatar enters and exits the state at will.

air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.name: Air Temple Hand-off
air-nomads-southern-water-tribe.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed back to the monks of the Western Air Temple.

earth-kingdom.name: Audience with the Earth King
earth-kingdom.description: Project kickoff: the team is presented at the palace of Ba Sing Se.

earth-kingdom.name: Drill Breaches the Wall
earth-kingdom.description: Build phase: the great drill is dismantled outside the outer wall.

earth-kingdom.name: Dai Li Coup Foiled
earth-kingdom.description: UAT gate: the conspiracy under Lake Laogai is exposed.

earth-kingdom.name: Liberation of Ba Sing Se
earth-kingdom.description: Go-Live: the Order of the White Lotus reclaims the city.

earth-kingdom.name: Return of the Earth King
earth-kingdom.description: Hyper-care close: King Kuei returns to his throne.

earth-kingdom.name: Tea Shop Grand Opening
earth-kingdom.description: Final invoice: the Jasmine Dragon opens its doors.

fire-nation.name: War Council Convenes
fire-nation.description: Discovery: the Fire Lord's strategy is set in the throne room.

fire-nation.name: Forge the Imperial Fleet
fire-nation.description: Build: the navy is launched from the harbor of Caldera.

fire-nation.name: Day of Black Sun
fire-nation.description: Solution review with the Fire Lord during the eclipse.

fire-nation.name: Sozin's Comet Activation
fire-nation.description: Go-Live: the firebenders' power reaches its peak.

fire-nation.name: Throne Room Falls Quiet
fire-nation.description: Project close: the war ends with Ozai's defeat.

fire-nation.name: Coronation of Fire Lord Zuko
fire-nation.description: Final invoice: a new era begins under Fire Lord Zuko.

northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.name: Council at Agna Qel'a
northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.description: Kickoff council in the great ice city of the north.

northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.name: Gaze into the Spirit Oasis
northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.description: Discovery: the koi pond reveals the path forward.

northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.name: Crossing into the Spirit World
northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.description: Build: the Avatar passes through Wan Shi Tong's library.

northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.name: Moon Spirit Restored
northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.description: UAT acceptance: Princess Yue gives her life and Tui returns.

northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.name: Siege of the North Lifted
northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.description: Go-Live + handoff: the Fire Nation fleet is repelled from the north.

northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.name: Final Recompense
northern-water-tribe-spirit-world.description: Final invoice from the Chief and the Council of Elders.

Avatar Aang.notes: Recovery in the Spirit World — meditation retreat with Roku.

Katara.notes: Healing study under Yagoda at the northern oasis.

Sokka.notes: Sword training with Master Piandao on Shu Jing.

Toph Beifong.notes: Earth Rumble VI championship — competing under The Blind Bandit.

King Bumi.notes: Rock candy harvest — mad genius needs his sweets.

Prince Zuko.notes: Ember Island family vacation — uncle's orders.

Princess Azula.notes: Lightning practice retreat at the volcano rim.

General Iroh.notes: Tea sourcing trip to the foothills outside Ba Sing Se.

Ty Lee.notes: Acrobatic showcase with the Kyoshi Warriors.

Master Pakku.notes: Visit to the Southern Water Tribe — re-establishing ties.

Avatar Roku.notes: Spirit World consultation — past-life advisory session.

Monk Gyatso.notes: Pie-baking competition at the Eastern Air Temple.
